title: Reed Diffuser Large Sphere in Black, Grey & White- Night Sky with Cotton Flower
features: Glass Reed Diffuser Large Sphere in Black, Grey & White
Perfect housewarming gift or general present for friends & family and general home decor
Unique handmade and mouth blown glass diffuser and 250ml bottle of cotton flower fragrance. Lasts between 4-6 months
description: Product description Reed Diffuser Large Sphere in Black, Grey & White. The set contains a handmade mouth blown glass diffuser . Pack of 7 black reeds, funnel and a 250ml bottle of cotton flower reed diffuser oil. Oil will last between 4-6 months. The diffuser may vary from the picture as this is a handmade item. So every diffuser will be unique. Height with reeds is 30cm Directions Insert the reeds into the diffuser. Add the cotton flower fragrance oil. Place the diffuser in a well-ventilated area. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. If you experience any irritation or allergic reaction, discontinue use and seek medical advice. Always use as intended and follow all safety guidelines. See more
